constraints.ocl:
context Payment
inv: self.amount >= 24 and self.amount <= 39

context Airport
inv: self.arrivingFlights->any(x | x.departureTime <> '') <> null

context Flight
inv: self.departureTime <> null and self.arrivalTime <> null

context Flight
inv: self.departureTime <> null implies self.arrivalTime <> null

context Booking
inv: (self.payment <> null) and (not(self.payment <> null))

context Airport
inv: (self.arrivingFlights->collect(x | x.bookings)->size() >= 3) and (not(self.arrivingFlights->collect(x | x.bookings)->size() >= 3))

context Flight
inv: (self.bookings->collect(x | x.baggages)->size() >= 2) and (not(self.bookings->collect(x | x.baggages)->size() >= 2))

context Booking
inv: (self.baggages->forAll(x | x.weightKg >= 1)) and (not(self.baggages->forAll(x | x.weightKg >= 1)))

context Aircraft
inv: (self.seats->exists(x | x.seatNo <> '')) and (not(self.seats->exists(x | x.seatNo <> '')))

context Airport
inv: (self.departingFlights->exists(x | x.flightNo <> '')) and (not(self.departingFlights->exists(x | x.flightNo <> '')))
